---
title: "Briana Maximino"
---

<div class="hero">

<h1>Briana Maximino</h1>

<p class="subtitle">
Future Marketing Strategist focused on campaign development, brand positioning, 
and consumer insight-driven marketing strategy.
</p>

<div class="hero-buttons">
<a href="projects.html" class="primary-btn">View Portfolio</a>
<a href="resume.html" class="secondary-btn">View Resume</a>
</div>

</div>

## Strategic Focus

My work explores how organizations strengthen brand relevance and consumer engagement 
through strategic marketing thinking, behavioral insight analysis, and experiential campaign concepts.

I am particularly interested in sports marketing, brand strategy, and consumer-focused campaign development.


## Portfolio Overview

This portfolio presents marketing analyses and campaign strategy concepts developed through 
academic research and applied business frameworks.

Core areas include:

• Campaign strategy development  
• Brand positioning analysis  
• Organizational and corporate evaluation  
• Consumer behavior integration  
• Marketing communication strategy  


## Professional Development

Through academic projects and independent learning, I have developed experience applying 
marketing frameworks to real-world business contexts.

My goal is to contribute strategic thinking and analytical support within dynamic marketing teams.


## Marketing Impact Perspective

I approach marketing strategy with an emphasis on measurable outcomes and long-term brand value.

This includes evaluating how marketing initiatives influence:

• Consumer engagement  
• Brand perception  
• Audience loyalty  
• Market competitiveness  
• Digital interaction effectiveness  


## Selected Strategic Work

<div class="preview-grid">

<a href="lagalaxy.html" class="preview-card">
<h3>LA Galaxy Campaign Strategy</h3>
<p>Gen Z engagement and experiential sports marketing concept.</p>
</a>

<a href="tesla.html" class="preview-card">
<h3>Tesla Corporate Strategy</h3>
<p>Sustainability positioning and competitive analysis.</p>
</a>

<a href="google.html" class="preview-card">
<h3>Google Organizational Analysis</h3>
<p>Innovation culture and performance alignment study.</p>
</a>

<a href="soackerz.html" class="preview-card">
<h3>Super Soaker Brand Strategy</h3>
<p>Consumer insight-driven positioning concept.</p>
</a>

</div>


## Career Direction

I am currently seeking marketing internship opportunities where I can contribute strategic thinking, 
analytical reasoning, and campaign development support.


<div class="personal-hook">

Marketing strategy is about shaping how people experience brands, connect emotionally, 
and engage with ideas that influence behavior.

</div>
